title: Revise images and examples in README.md
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Picture perfect README
gist.blurb: We dusted off the repository README and fixed some missing images. The gallery is looking fresh, vibrant, and fully functional again!
gist.summary: Fixed broken image links in the project README by regenerating examples with the original prompts and hosting them reliably.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will now see a fully functioning gallery of example images instead of broken links.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot fixing up an art gallery. The robot loves pictures, so it makes sense for it to be holding a newly generated image frame to replace a broken one.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot hanging up freshly painted picture frames on a wall. The robot holds a beautiful landscape picture with its stubby arms. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
